calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-18-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Bernstein for and with Lianne Wong.

The Court stated that it read the declarations of Leo Wong and Paul Fong as to the authenticity of the signature on the will. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed (subject to review of the order). The will is admitted to probate. Bond is waived.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-04-2017 Continued To Oct-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Sep-06-2017 Continued To Oct-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
